# Virtuoso Psychology

> Performance psychology for sport and business. Virtuoso Psychology helps teams,
> organisations, leaders and individuals know their people, recruit the best, and
> be the best — through plain-spoken, evidence-based practice built to leave you
> stronger, never dependent.

Virtuoso Psychology is the practice of **Cara Lea Moseley**, a performance
psychologist and former international athlete. The approach is grounded,
evidence-based, and rooted in empowerment and sustainability: psychology is
treated as a relationship and a service, not a product to be sold. Engagements
are designed to hand capability back to the client rather than create a
dependency.

- Website: https://www.virtuosopsychology.com
- Areas served: United Kingdom and worldwide (works internationally)
- Contact: cara@virtuosopsychology.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/virtuoso.psychology
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cara-lea-moseley-267b744a/

## Founder — Cara Lea Moseley

- HCPC Accredited Performance Psychologist
- BPS Chartered Psychologist (British Psychological Society)
- BACP qualified Counselling Psychotherapist
- Almost 20 years' experience in professional sport and business
- 64+ senior international caps for Wales in netball
- 2× World Championships (2007, 2011) · 2× Commonwealth Games (2014, 2018)
- Has worked with The Football Association; alumna of Brighton & Hove Albion FC

Cara competed at the highest level of international sport and applies a
value-driven, strengths-based approach informed by current research and data
insight to drive performance and maximise potential.

## Services

1. **Teams & Organisations** — Recruitment, onboarding, and cultural and
   strategic development for the people and systems behind high performance.
   Includes recruitment & onboarding, cultural development, strategic
   development, leadership coaching and mentoring, and developing
   psychologically informed systems.

2. **Leaders & Individuals** — Coaching, performance psychology, and wellbeing
   support for leaders and individuals carrying real pressure in sport or
   business. Includes leadership coaching and mentoring, performance psychology
   support, and mental health and wellbeing support.

3. **Speaking** — Insight-led talks on leadership, performance culture,
   performance psychology, and wellbeing in sport, for clubs, federations,
   governing bodies, and businesses.

## How engagements work

1. **Listen** — Start where you are, with your people, your pressures, and the
   moment you're in; listen, observe, learn.
2. **Build** — Build tailored, evidence-based solutions together that fit you,
   not a template.
3. **Hand over** — Empower you to take charge and lead, leaving you more capable
   than you arrived.

## Topics of expertise

Performance psychology, sport psychology, high performance culture, recruitment
and onboarding, leadership coaching, organisational development, performance
under pressure, athlete wellbeing, and mental health and wellbeing in sport.
